name: Eli Lilly and Company
description: Eli Lilly and Company is an American multinational pharmaceutical corporation headquartered in Indianapolis, Indiana. Founded in 1876, the company focuses on discovering, developing, and marketing human pharmaceuticals across various therapeutic areas, including diabetes, oncology, immunology, and neuroscience. Lilly is committed to creating medicines that make life better for people around the world, investing heavily in research and development to address unmet medical needs. With a global presence, the company distributes its products in approximately 125 countries, maintaining a long-standing reputation for innovation and patient-centered care in the healthcare industry.
